'''Baloob''', nicknamed "'''Big Nose'''" by [[Den Dhur]], was an [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a [[Bartender/Legends|pubtender]] of the [[Rimsoo Seven cantina|cantina]] stationed on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The cantina was opened for the military and medical personnel that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] sent to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and was based at [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 7]]. He survived the attack of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces against the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Rimsoo]], and took up again the business in the new location. When the Republic forces discovered that the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]] had no use anymore, Baloob and the rest of the personnel left Drongar.
